fields.name: Sankar K
fields.title: Backend Dev.
fields.tech_stack: Python · Django · DRF · PostgreSQL · Redis · Celery · OAuth · JWT
fields.bio: I build backend systems that scale. Over 3.6 years at TCS, I've engineered Django-powered REST APIs with OAuth 2.0 & JWT authentication, async task pipelines, and Redis-cached architectures — delivering measurable performance gains in production.
fields.footer_text: Designed & built — Sankar K © 2026 · Python Django Developer · Chennai, India

fields.text: Design & ship scalable RESTful APIs with OAuth 2.0 and JWT authentication
Implement Redis caching to reduce database load and improve response times
Build async task pipelines using Celery + Redis to decouple background jobs
Refactor & optimise PostgreSQL queries for measurable performance gains
Collaborate across frontend, QA, and product teams on tight deadlines

fields.name: Complete Python Bootcamp — Zero to Hero

fields.text: Promoted to System Engineer after 3 years of consistent delivery — progressing through Graduate Trainee → Programmer → ASE → SE.
Leading backend development of Django REST Framework APIs for production systems, owning end-to-end design, implementation, and optimisation of critical service endpoints.
Implemented secure authentication systems using OAuth 2.0 and JWT tokens, ensuring robust user authentication and authorization across multiple applications with token-based session management.
Introduced Redis caching and Celery-based async task processing to improve throughput on data-heavy API endpoints, reducing average response time for background operations.
Recognised with TCS Gems Service & Commitment Award (Sep 2025) for sustained excellence and 3 years of dedicated contribution.

Delivered the 30% system performance improvement through a focused refactoring initiative — profiling bottlenecks, rewriting inefficient ORM queries, and introducing Redis caching across core Django views.
Designed and implemented RESTful API authentication using JWT, improving security posture and enabling stateless session management across distributed services.
Completed MCA with 9.54 CGPA from SRMIST while maintaining full-time engineering delivery at TCS — demonstrating strong time management and discipline.
Built and scaled Python scripting pipelines reducing manual data-processing workload by approximately 40%, directly improving team throughput during high-volume delivery.
Developed DRF API endpoints and integrated Celery for async task handling, establishing background processing patterns adopted in later project phases.
Managed SQLite3-backed internal tooling ensuring data integrity through structured input validation and ORM best practices.
Built foundational Django web applications and REST API integrations, gaining production-level experience with Git, SQLite3, and cross-team collaboration.
Contributed to internal tooling and backend workflow systems, establishing best practices that supported team efficiency in subsequent cycles.
Built and maintained Python desktop applications with SQLite3 backends for internal data storage, querying, and operational workflows.

fields.title: Multi-vendor Restaurant Marketplace
fields.description: Production-ready food delivery platform with multi-vendor support, role-based access control for customers, vendors & admins, and location-based restaurant filtering. Features dynamic cart with session management and a full relational schema for multi-vendor food categories and order states.
fields.label: GitHub →
fields.tags: Django, DRF, PostgreSQL, RBAC, Django ORM, Git

fields.title: Calorie Calculator — Django App
fields.description: Full-stack Django web application calculating daily calorie intake based on user-selected food items. Relational data model covering 100+ food categories stored in SQLite3, with class-based views, structured input validation, and full MVT architecture following Django best practices.
fields.label: SRMIST Thesis
fields.tags: Django, SQLite3, CBVs, Django ORM, MVT, Git

fields.school: K.S. Rangasamy College of Arts & Science, Tiruchengode

fields.title: TCS Gems — Service & Commitment Award
fields.description: Recognised for completing 3 years of dedicated service and consistent high performance at Tata Consultancy Services.

fields.title: TCS Gems — Certificate of Appreciation
fields.description: Awarded for contributing to CMI CSR Community events and supporting CSR initiatives at TCS.

fields.title: 4-Level Promotion in 3 Years
fields.description: Progressed from Graduate Trainee → Programmer → ASE → System Engineer based on consistent technical delivery.
